description: User waits on the loading screen while the system confirms flight details.
The browser navigates from the baggage/confirmation page to the traveller details entry page.
The traveller details page content loads progressively, displaying the price summary and then the 'Adult 1' information form.
frame_description: Price summary and form fields appear on the screen.

description: User pauses to examine the newly loaded traveller details form and the 'Heads up!' notification.
